query: INSERT INTO threat_actors (actorId, name, aliases, actorType, origin, description, motivation, firstSeen, lastActive, threatLevel, sophistication, targetSectors, targetRegions, techniques, tools, malware, dataSource, confidence) VALUES ('fulcrumsec', 'FULCRUMSEC', '["The Threat Thespians", "FulcrumSec"]', 'ransomware', 'Unknown', 'FULCRUMSEC (aka The Threat Thespians) is a data extortion group first observed in September 2025. They operate a steal-then-threaten model, exfiltrating data and publishing victims across a dedicated Dark Web Data Leak Site (DLS), underground forums (DarkForums), and Telegram. Known for targeting cloud infrastructure (AWS) and exploiting web application vulnerabilities. Their extortion methods include blackmail, data auctions, direct extortion, double extortion, free data leaks, and kill chain write-ups. Sources: Daily Dark Web (dailydarkweb.net), WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker, KrakenLabs (@KrakenLabs_Team).', 'financial', '2025-09', '2026-03', 'high', 'advanced', '["Legal & Professional Services", "Electronics", "FinTech", "Military/Industrial", "Information Analytics"]', '["United States", "Australia", "United Kingdom"]', '[{"id":"T1190","name":"Exploit Public-Facing Application","tactic":"Initial Access","score":90,"description":"Exploited vulnerable React container (React2Shell)"},{"id":"T1078","name":"Valid Accounts","tactic":"Persistence","score":85,"description":"Exploited container role credentials"},{"id":"T1078.004","name":"Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts","tactic":"Persistence","score":85,"description":"Leveraged AWS cloud account access"},{"id":"T1530","name":"Data from Cloud Storage Object","tactic":"Collection","score":90,"description":"Exfiltrated data from Redshift and VPC databases"},{"id":"T1537","name":"Transfer Data to Cloud Account","tactic":"Exfiltration","score":80,"description":"Transferred 2.04GB of structured data"},{"id":"T1552.005","name":"Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API","tactic":"Credential Access","score":85,"description":"Accessed AWS metadata for credential harvesting"},{"id":"T1552.001","name":"Unsecured Credentials: Credentials In Files","tactic":"Credential Access","score":90,"description":"Extracted 53 AWS Secrets Manager secrets in plaintext"},{"id":"T1580","name":"Cloud Infrastructure Discovery","tactic":"Discovery","score":80,"description":"Mapped complete VPC infrastructure"},{"id":"T1619","name":"Cloud Storage Object Discovery","tactic":"Discovery","score":80,"description":"Discovered 536 Redshift tables and 430+ VPC tables"},{"id":"T1087.004","name":"Account Discovery: Cloud Account","tactic":"Discovery","score":75,"description":"Enumerated cloud user accounts and profiles"}]', '["React2Shell exploit", "AWS CLI", "Redshift query tools"]', '[]', 'osint', 90) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lastActive='2026-03', threatLevel='high', confidence=90;
